CASE MANAGEMENT CONFERENCE
Off Calendar Apr-03-2013 Set For Order To Show Cause On Jun-18-13 At 10:30 A.M. In Dept 610

Ntc Of Mtn And Mtn To Quash Summons And To Set Aside Default And Default Judgment Entered 8/3/12
Off Calendar Feb-26-2013 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES:

No appearance on this matter. The Court adopted its tentative ruling.
DEFENDANT JETTE VAKKALA'S Motion To Quash Summons And To Set Aside Default And Default Judgment Entered 8/3/12 - The motion is granted. Defendant has maintained her evidentiary burden and demonstrates a lack of actual notice. See CCP 473.5. ORDER SIGNED. Judge: Marla J. Miller, Clerk: Cynthia Herbert; Court Reporter: Anthony C. Vaughn, CSR # 6185 = (302/MJM)
